title: lycopus formosanus
intro: Lycopus formosanus, also known as Formosan bugleweed, is a perennial herb native to Taiwan and other parts of East Asia. This plant is a member of the Lamiaceae family and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiviral compounds. The health benefits of Lycopus formosanus include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce anxiety, and improve sleep quality, as well as its potential to have antimicrobial and antifungal effects. In herbal preparations, Lycopus formosanus is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and may also be combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
